context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.role: Visual feedback after cleaning cage floor
context.screen_position: Spawns at random positions on floor area (y=110-125, x=random)
context.usage_scenario: 3 sparkles spawn when player completes cleaning swipe, indicates successful cleaning

animation.description: Frames 1-3: sparkle expands from 1px to 3px, Frames 4-6: sparkle contracts back to 1px and disappears

visual_specification.details: White sparkle (#FFF1E8) with 4-point star shape, 3 sparkles spawn at random floor positions after cleaning, each expands from 1px to 3px then contracts, total duration 1 second, creates satisfying clean feedback

relationships.shared_with: All particle effects share temporary display behavior
relationships.differences_from: dust_particle (opposite context and color), all other particles (expansion/contraction animation)

explicit_negations: No movement across screen (stays in spawn position)
No continuous spawning (only on cleaning action)
No sound wave or impact effects
